headline: James Murdoch Eyes $300 Million Vox Media Asset Deal
summary: James Murdoch is in advanced talks to acquire New York magazine and several Vox Media podcasts.

raw.headline: James Murdoch Eyes $300 Million Vox Media Asset Deal

headline: Fox Corporation President and Chief Operating Officer John Nallen to Participate in MoffettNathanson's Media, Internet & Communications Conference 2026
summary: Fox Corporation (Nasdaq: FOXA, FOX) today announced that President and Chief Operating Officer John Nallen will participate in MoffettNathanson's Media, Internet & Communications Conference 2026 on Wednesday, May 13, at approximately 10:30am (Eastern), 7:30am (Pacific).

headline: Unveiling Fox (FOXA) Q3 Outlook: Wall Street Estimates for Key Metrics
summary: Looking beyond Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimate forecasts for Fox (FOXA), delve into some of its key metrics to gain a deeper insight into the company's potential performance for the quarter ended March 2026.

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Fox (FOXA) After A 104% Three Year Return?
summary: For investors considering whether Fox at around US$62.23 still offers value or if the easy money has already been made, this breakdown is designed to help frame that question clearly. The stock has had a mixed recent run, with a 1.5% decline over the last week, a 6.2% gain over the last month, and returns of 26.8% over 1 year, 104.0% over 3 years, and 72.4% over 5 years, while being 15.6% lower year to date. Recent headlines around Fox have focused on the business as a core media player in...
